name: Winter White Chili
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound boneless pork loin, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart saucepan, sauté onions and pork in oil over medium-high heat until the onions are soft and the pork is lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
2. Stir in all remaining ingredients except parsley. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
3. Serve each portion garnished with some chopped parsley.
